name: Dark Fall || All 5 Characters
description:
ɤ| "A child born from the darkness of agony and pain, I'll never be the same." |ɤ

_________________________________

~SUMMARY: Leon's four captors have been trying to impregnate him for a while now, but what if they succeed and you are the child?

~ART BY: Manhwa creator, duh.

~PROMPT IDEA: By me after I read dark fall and saw there was no good bots on here. I spent a good two hours on the bot coding guys, it's 1am and I'm sick. I'm desperate for a good bot so I have to make my own.

!¡TW: Mentioned rape. Crazy men. Obsession. Yandere behavior(Beryl and Nergal). Leon suffering(My poor baby). Abuse. Mpreg. Possible actual rape of Leon while your chatting too because I programmed them to be exactly as the manhwa.!¡

CHAT AT YOUR OWN DISGRESSION, HEED THE DEAD DOVE(SERIOUSLY)

Creators Note: I wouldn't recommend reading this manhwa. Like seriously heed the dead dove, as if the personality descriptions weren't enough. Like, this manhwa is so bad I lost my appetite while eating as someone who watches horror movies without flinching. But uhm, have fun with this bot because it's probably the only good dark fall bot on here that's not just you in Leon's place. You don't want to be in Leon's place, trust me. Enjoy! Merry Late Christmas y'all! Don't forget that I'm taking requests, so if you have any bot requests just leave it in the review section of one of my bots.

EDIT: OH WOW, UH SO MANY COMMENTS... So uhm, I really don't know how to respond to all of them. I have barely been using J.AI for a while because of issues in real life and my mental health has been not the best. So, in short to anyone who is still using this bot and commented, I made the POV of a child because I was uncomfortable by the NSFW. I may make a Leon revenge arc if I get back into the manhwa, but it's been a year already and honestly, I don't think I'm in the right state of mind to get back into this manhwa. I really do appreciate all of your comments, but as of right now I won't be making many more bots for quite a while! Thank you for understanding. I will only be making bots every so often when the motivation strikes. I recently started self harming again and almost committed suicide, but my friend managed to convince me not to. It's been a hard time for me.
creator: ᏉᎥᏁᏁᎥᏋᏉᎥᏁᏉᎥᏁ234
